title: NLU entity type → Knowledge Graph resolution
description: For each predicted NLU entity slot, defines the target Neo4j label, how to match extracted text to a node id, and what to do when resolution fails. Aligns with ontology_v1 node labels; extend when new entity types are added to Phase 2 benchmarks.
global_fallback_order: Try primary match strategy on target label
Apply fallback_behavior for this entity type

fallback_behaviors_documented.clarify: Do not guess; ask the user a targeted follow-up (see fallback_user_hint).
fallback_behaviors_documented.skip: Omit this entity from graph traversal; continue with other context.
fallback_behaviors_documented.nearest_concept: Optional Phase 4: fuzzy match Concept.aliases under confidence floor (not implemented in v1).

entity_types.description: Deduction / credit / exemption family (e.g. personal relief, donation relief).
entity_types.fallback_user_hint: Which relief or deduction do you mean (e.g. personal relief, donation relief)?
Which type of income are you asking about?

entity_types.description: Resident vs non-resident / days-in-country style cues.
entity_types.fallback_user_hint: Are you asking about tax residence in Sri Lanka specifically?

entity_types.description: Year of assessment / tax year (numeric or FY label).

match.notes: No single canonical node; pass to symbolic engine / filter lex_effective_* windows in Phase 4.

entity_types.description: Currency amounts; rarely maps to one graph node without context.

match.notes: Use with RateBand or procedural rules in Phase 5; do not MERGE a node from amount alone.

entity_types.fallback_user_hint: What should this amount be compared against (e.g. relief cap, tax band)?

entity_types.description: User cites 'Section N' or schedule reference string.

match.notes: Compose section_uid from resolved LawInstrument source_doc_id + normalized section_label; requires active instrument context from intent or retrieval.

entity_types.fallback_user_hint: Which Act or document should this section refer to (e.g. IRA 2017 consolidated)?

entity_types.description: Named Act, amendment, or circular (short title).
entity_types.fallback_user_hint: Which official document edition do you mean (see IRD manifest source_doc_id)?
